scope.question: Review source fidelity and extraction fidelity for the D+Q bone ClinicalTrials.gov registry text-snapshot candidate.

inputs.summary: Submitted text-snapshot candidate for the retained D+Q bone ClinicalTrials.gov registry payload and normalized artifacts.
ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshot with public_registry access policy and raw_storage path.
Retained registry text snapshot with raw JSON, normalized markdown, section-index artifacts, and hashes.
Public-registry source-rights record allowing retained registry artifacts and artifact manifests.
Retained raw JSON, normalized markdown, and sections JSON artifacts reviewed for hash and section consistency.

outputs.summary: Completed source-fidelity and extraction-fidelity supervisor reviews for the registry text-snapshot candidate, linked both accepting non-blocking reviews, and moved the candidate to in_review.

proposed_records.rationale: Moved the candidate to in_review and linked the accepting source-fidelity and extraction-fidelity supervisor reviews.
Records source-fidelity supervisor review of raw payload hash, access policy, source-rights alignment, and artifact paths.
Records extraction-fidelity supervisor review of normalized markdown sections, section index, and registry-text limitations.

quality_checks.summary: sha256sum verified that raw JSON, normalized markdown, and sections JSON match the hashes recorded in the text_snapshot manifest.
The text_snapshot section_index and sections.json both contain eight matching registry sections.
The candidate now has active complete source_fidelity and extraction_fidelity reviews with verdict accept and blocking false.
npm run verify:knowledge-base passed after review linkage and export refresh.

next_actions: Promote or revise the registry text-snapshot candidate.
Use the retained registry markdown as input for the next registry extraction-refresh repair pass.
